AddStandardReceiver* / Remove* methods return string (error message or null) not bool.
AvailableToAllProfilesOfCustomer: if true on creation, receiver is added to ALL profiles of customer at creation time.
DeleteGroup deleteMembers=false by default — must explicitly pass true to remove orphaned members.
InboundMessageEventListener uses PhoneNumberTools.PhoneGetParts with '+' prefix on receiver number and DanishCountryId as default.
KeywordRegistrator is injected into StandardReceiverService — keyword registration triggered on receiver create/update.
OverruleBlocked=true: inbound distribution messages bypass blocked status on receiver.
SCIM group lookup is by name + customerId (not by external ID alone).
TestMode=false always for distribution sends — live sends only.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
